condition: player.docked and player.location == "sorrow_station" and "trusted_prudence" in player.flags and not ("grissom_said_his_piece" in player.flags)

opens.text: You sat there. Whole bar coming apart and Thibodeaux's captain just — watched. Either you're the coldest hand on this ring or you knew exactly what that thing could do and let me find out with my own wrist.

choices.text: She didn't need me. You did the finding out.

finding_out.text: Yeah. — He works his wrist, thoughtful, and for one honest second the anger has nowhere to sit. — She pulled it, you know. The catch. Felt like a bulkhead deciding to be gentle. You'd trust a thing like that with your ship, I guess. Maybe that's the whole argument.

nothing_personal.text: It's all personal, captain. That's what a station IS — four thousand people taking everything personally in a can. — He raises the glass a grudging inch. — Your droid files accurate paperwork, anyway. Arbiter read it out. 'Minimized structural damage.' Hell of a sentence.
